title: Woomy's ENReco Elytra
description: An elytra retextured to resemble the ENReco capes.
body:
Retextured the default elytra to look like the Enigmatic Recollection cape featured in the HoloEN Minecraft server. 

Not a one-to-one recreation of the elytras featured in the official server.

*Not affiliated with COVER. 

![The image features a white elytra with blue accents, in the middle is a circular, blue emblem.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83850facc37cdbb795bda948912c0b43414d312.png)
